title: Tommys wifi-ping pack
description: Make the ping icon look like wifi
body:
# Tommy's wifi-ping pack 🛜
This resource pack changes the ping icon in the server list into wifi icon!
## Simple intro 📖
Are you bored with the lack icon of ping in the server list?\
![Vanilla ping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49842692c731002b54f87e24b8859bc91a0aff04.png)\
Well that's gone now! Check out the wifi ping pack!\
![Wifi ping pack ping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb2c85ed8bf2c5a3d9c534a696ea992463a5ea7b.png)\
That's all the thing this pack does, enjoy!
